jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
